{{Infobox artifact
| name = Reaper’s Scythe
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Reaper’s Scythe]] is the only weapon capable of erasing a world thoroughly.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Reaper]]'s Scythe is a weapon that squirmed in [[Makiel]]'s grip out of desire to return to its creator.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Reaper’s Scythe]] is a colorless light that can reduce chaos workings to nothing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
